reasoning: The control requires periodic vulnerability scanning of systems and applications. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that container images are scanned for vulnerabilities before being deployed. This can be achieved by integrating image scanning tools that check for vulnerabilities at the time of image admission. Additionally, setting the image pull policy to 'Always' ensures that the latest version of the image is used, which should have been scanned for vulnerabilities.
title: 3_11_2: 3.11.2 Scan for vulnerabilities in organizational systems and applications periodically and when new vulnerabilities affecting those systems and applications are identified
